<!-- @generated by usage-cli from usage spec -->
# `x-multi-ping`

Multi-protocol ping for IPv4 and IPv6


- **Usage**: `x-multi-ping [FLAGS] <hostnames>…`

## Arguments

### `<hostnames>…`

Hostnames to ping

## Flags

### `--help`

Show help

### `--verbose`

Verbose output

### `--loop`

Loop indefinitely

### `--forever`

Loop indefinitely (alias)

### `--sleep <seconds>`

Sleep between iterations (default: 1)
